page.title: Access & Collaboration
page.intro:
MyFamTreeCollab uses account types that determine what you can do. The basic version is free and fully local,
  no account required. Cloud storage and collaboration are available via an Owner account (donation).

hoe.title: ⚙️ How does access work?
hoe.stap1_tekst: anyone can immediately view a demo family tree without an account.
hoe.stap2_tekst: free registration gives access to up to 60 persons locally.
hoe.stap3_tekst: a donation activates cloud backup, sharing and collaboration.
hoe.stap4_tekst: an Owner invites others and grants them read or edit access to a specific family tree.

bezoeker.beschrijving: Visitor without an account. Can only view a demo family tree. No storage, no features.

guest.beschrijving: Free account. Local family tree up to 60 persons. No cloud, no collaboration.

owner.beschrijving: Full access. Cloud backup, unlimited persons, family tree sharing and collaboration.

rechten.title: 📋 Family tree rights: Viewer & Editor
rechten.intro: Viewer and Editor are not account types — they are rights granted by an Owner to a specific family tree. A user guest with access gcan be Viewer or Editor on an Owner's family tree.

viewer.beschrijving: Read access to a shared family tree. Assigned by the Owner of that tree.

editor.beschrijving: Edit access to a shared family tree. Assigned by the Owner of that tree.

donatie.title: ☕ Donation options (Owner account)
donatie.intro: An Owner account is activated via a donation. Basic accounts (guest) are completely free.
donatie.periodiek_wat: Owner account active as long as the donation is running for two family trees (Cloud backup). Family tree sharing and collaboration. No further obligations.
donatie.eenmalig_wat: Owner account active for the duration of the donation for three family trees (Cloud backup). Family tree sharing and collaboration. No further obligations.
donatie.stichtend_wat: Owner activation + early access to new features + listed as founding member.
donatie.noot: Transparency: there is no automatic payment verification yet. The Owner account is activated manually after receipt of a donation. This will be automated in a future phase.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.tekst: Start for free with a basic account, or view the detailed comparison on the pricing page.
